description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1), operating in manual mode, was stopped for a red traffic light  on northbound Bryant St at the intersection with 
6th St in San Francisco with an SUV (Vehicle 2) traveling directly behind . As the signal turned green the Zoox vehicle remained stopped to 
avoid blocking the intersection as traffic was still stopped ahead. The SUV proceeded to move into the adjacent left lane, when its front 
bumper on the passenger's side made contact with the driver's side rear bumper of the Zoox vehicle. The front bumper of the SUV appeared 
to have sustained minor damage. The driver of the SUV left the scene without exchanging information. There were no reported injuries and 
the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
